FreeMind is a premier free mind-mapping software written in Java

  • 解决 Freemind 中文字体乱码 由于 Freemind 要应用到 Java 运行时环境，显示中文字体乱码是由于 JRE 的字体造成的，所以更改 JRE 的字体即可。找一个可用于中文显示的字体，比如： wqy 字体，这里采用增黑。 确认字体已经安装于系统，我的系统增黑字体安装于： Text Only

    /usr/share/fonts/truetype/wqy/wqy-zenhei.ttf
    找到 JRE 的字体目录，位于： Text Only
    /usr/lib/jvm/java-6-sun/jre/lib/fonts/
    创建字体目录： Bash
    cd /usr/lib/jvm/java-6-sun/jre/lib/fonts/
sudo mkdir fallback
sudo ln -s /usr/share/fonts/truetype/wqy/wqy-zenhei.ttf wqy-zenhei.ttf
sudo mkfontdir
sudo mkfontscale
    重启 Freemind 即可

docs.title: Algorithms
docs.text:
Source: dsa/alg/

  • 递归和循环 — 用递归表达分治思路，用循环优化空间；阶乘、斐波那契为典型
  • 查找和排序 — 二分查找 O(log n)；快排/归并 O(n log n)，见 Search 和 Sort
  • 排列组合 — 全排列、组合数枚举；dsa/alg/permutation_combination.cpp
  • 回溯法 — 枚举所有可能，不满足条件则剪枝
  • 动态规划与贪心 — DP 利用子问题重叠；贪心每步取局部最优，见 DP
  • 位运算 — 用于高效计算奇偶、幂次、集合操作

docs.title: DP (Dynamic Programming)
docs.text:
动态规划将问题分解为**重叠子问题**，利用记忆化或递推避免重复计算。

核心思路：定义状态 → 写出状态转移方程 → 确定边界条件。

docs.title: 斐波那契数列
饼干分配问题
docs.text:
问题1：n 块饼，每天吃 1~3 块，吃完为止，共有多少种吃法？

状态转移：f(n) = f(n-1) + f(n-2) + f(n-3)，边界：f(0)=1

C++
int f1(int n) {
    if (n <= 0) return n == 0;
    return f1(n-1) + f1(n-2) + f1(n-3);
}
// f1(10) = 274

问题2：n 块饼干分 t 天吃完，每天吃 1 或 2 块，共有多少种吃法？

C++
int f2(int n, int t) {
    if (n > 2*t || n < t) return 0;
    if (t == 1) return 1;
    return f2(n-1, t-1) + f2(n-2, t-1);
}
// f2(10, 7) = 35

docs.title: LeetCode
docs.text: • 动态规划精选题单

docs.title: Binary Search
docs.text:
• 二分查找也称折半查找（Binary Search），它是一种效率较高的查找方法，可以在数据规模的对数时间复杂度内完成查找。
  • 二分查找可以应用于数组，是因为数组具有有随机访问的特点，并且数组是有序的。
  • 二分查找体现的数学思想是「减而治之」，可以通过当前看到的中间元素的特点推测它两侧元素的性质，以达到缩减问题规模的效果。

DFS (Depth-First Search)
docs.text: • complement: recursion

docs.title: Binary Tree
docs.text:
• Preorder Traversal

  • Inorder Traversal

    • 二叉搜索树的中序遍历为 递增序列

  • Postorder Traversal C++

    vector<int> *res;
void dfs(TreeNode* node) {
    if(node->left != nullptr) dfs(node->left);
    if(node->right != nullptr) dfs(node->right);
    res->push_back(node->val);
}
vector<int> preorderTraversal(TreeNode* root) {
    res = new vector<int>();
    if(root != nullptr) dfs(root);
    return *res;
}

docs.title: BFS (Breadth-First Search)
docs.text: • complement: iteration / circulation

docs.title: Binary Tree
docs.text:
• Level-order Traversal C++
    vector<vector<int>> levelOrder(TreeNode* root) {
    vector<vector<int>> ret;
    if(root == nullptr) return ret;

    queue<TreeNode*> q;
    q.push(root);
    while(!q.empty()) {
        int sz = q.size();
        ret.push_back(vector<int>());
        for(int i=0; i<sz; i++) {
            auto node = q.front(); q.pop();
            ret.back().push_back(node->val);
            if(node->left != nullptr) q.push(node->left);
            if(node->right != nullptr) q.push(node->right);
        }
    }

    return ret;
}

docs.title: BFS (Best-First Search)
docs.text: • Dijkstra Algorithm

docs.title: LeetCode
docs.text:
• leetcode 200: 岛屿数量 C++
    int nr = 0;
int nc = 0;
const int dx[4] = {0, 0, -1, 1};
const int dy[4] = {-1, 1, 0, 0};

void dfs(vector<vector<char>>& grid, int r, int c) {
    grid[r][c] = '0';

    if(r-1>=0 && grid[r-1][c] == '1') dfs(grid, r-1, c);
    if(r+1<nr && grid[r+1][c] == '1') dfs(grid, r+1, c);
    if(c-1>=0 && grid[r][c-1] == '1') dfs(grid, r, c-1);
    if(c+1<nc && grid[r][c+1] == '1') dfs(grid, r, c+1);
}

void bfs(vector<vector<char>>& grid, int r, int c) {
    queue<std::pair<int,int>> que;
    que.push({r,c});
    grid[r][c] = '0';

    while(!que.empty()) {
        auto rc = que.front();
        que.pop();
        for(int i=0; i<4; i++) {
            int y = rc.first + dy[i];
            int x = rc.second + dx[i];
            if(x>=0 && x<nc && y>=0 && y<nr && grid[y][x]=='1') {
                que.push({y, x});
                grid[y][x] = '0';
            }
        }
    }
}

int numIslands(vector<vector<char>>& grid) {
    nr = grid.size();
    if(nr == 0) return nr;
    nc = grid[0].size();

    int num = 0;
    for(int y=0; y<nr; y++) {
        for(int x=0; x<nc; x++) {
            if(grid[y][x] == '1') {
                num++;
                bfs(grid, y, x);
            }
        }
    }
    return num;
}

docs.title: DSA Merge Implementation Plan
docs.text:
For agentic workers: REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (- [ ]) syntax for tracking.

Goal: Merge /opt/user_data/code/DSA into GraphX — tree code at root, rest under dsa/, docs folded into GraphX's docs/, mkdocs.yml extended.

Architecture: Direct file copy (no git history). DSA/tree/ → GraphX/tree/ (graph subtype, lives at root). All other DSA code → GraphX/dsa/. DSA docs → GraphX/docs/{tree,alg,cpp}/. GraphX mkdocs.yml gains three new nav sections.

Tech Stack: Bash (cp), CMake 3.0+, MkDocs Material

docs.title: Task 1: Copy tree/ to GraphX root
docs.text:
Files: - Create: tree/binary_tree.cc, tree/binary_tree.h, tree/binary_tree_01.cc, tree/binary_tree_01.h, tree/main.cc

  • Step 1: Copy tree source files
Bash
cp -r /opt/user_data/code/DSA/tree /opt/user_data/code/GraphX/tree
  • Step 2: Verify files are in place

Bash

ls /opt/user_data/code/GraphX/tree
Expected output: Text Only
binary_tree.cc  binary_tree.h  binary_tree_01.cc  binary_tree_01.h  main.cc

  • Step 3: Commit
Bash
cd /opt/user_data/code/GraphX
git add tree/
git commit -m "feat: add tree/ from DSA (tree is a graph subtype)"

docs.title: Task 2: Copy remaining DSA code into dsa/
docs.text:
Files: - Create: dsa/alg/, dsa/linked_list/, dsa/mix/, dsa/unit_test/, dsa/.clang-format, dsa/README.md, dsa/CMakeLists.txt

  • Step 1: Create dsa/ and copy code directories
Bash
cd /opt/user_data/code/GraphX
mkdir -p dsa
cp -r /opt/user_data/code/DSA/alg dsa/alg
cp -r /opt/user_data/code/DSA/linked_list dsa/linked_list
cp -r /opt/user_data/code/DSA/mix dsa/mix

cp /opt/user_data/code/DSA/.clang-format dsa/.clang-format
cp /opt/user_data/code/DSA/README.md dsa/README.md
cp /opt/user_data/code/DSA/CMakeLists.txt dsa/CMakeLists.txt
  • Step 2: Verify structure

Bash

ls dsa/
Expected output: Text Only
alg  CMakeLists.txt  .clang-format  linked_list  mix  README.md  unit_test

  • Step 3: Commit
Bash
git add dsa/
git commit -m "feat: add dsa/ subdirectory from DSA repo"

docs.title: Task 3: Fix CMakeLists.txt tree path
docs.text:
Files: - Modify: dsa/CMakeLists.txt

Since tree/ is now at ../tree relative to dsa/, two lines need updating.

  • Step 1: Edit include_directories

In dsa/CMakeLists.txt, replace: CMake

include_directories(${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR})
with: CMake
include_directories(${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR} ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/..)

  • Step 2: Edit aux_source_directory for tree

Replace: CMake

aux_source_directory(${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/tree SRC_TREE)
with: CMake
aux_source_directory(${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/../tree SRC_TREE)

  • Step 3: Verify the build succeeds

Bash

cd /opt/user_data/code/GraphX/dsa
mkdir -p build && cd build
cmake ..
make
Expected: all targets build without errors (linked_list, binary_tree, sparse_matrix, algorithm, etc.)

  • Step 4: Run tests (if GTest available)

Bash

ctest
Expected: tests pass (or skip gracefully if GTest not installed)

  • Step 5: Commit
Bash
cd /opt/user_data/code/GraphX
git add dsa/CMakeLists.txt
git commit -m "fix: adjust CMakeLists.txt tree path for new dsa/ layout"

- **`tree/`** — C++ binary tree implementations (from DSA; tree is a graph subtype). Built as part of `dsa/CMakeLists.txt`.
- **`dsa/`** — C++ data structures and algorithms (linked lists, sparse matrix, general algorithms, unit tests). Built with CMake from `dsa/`; see `dsa/README.md`.

cd dsa && mkdir -p build && cd build
cmake ..
make
ctest          # requires GTest
Text Only

git commit -m "docs: update CLAUDE.md to reflect DSA merge"

docs.title: Design: Merge DSA into GraphX
docs.text: Date: 2026-04-16 Approach: Plan A — direct file copy, no git history preservation

docs.title: Goal
docs.text: Merge the contents of the sibling repository /opt/user_data/code/DSA into GraphX. DSA contains C++ implementations of linked lists, trees, and general algorithms, plus MkDocs documentation.

docs.title: Target Directory Structure
docs.text:
Text Only
GraphX/
├── tree/                        # From DSA/tree/ — tree is a graph subtype, lives at root
│   ├── binary_tree.cc / .h
│   ├── binary_tree_01.cc / .h
│   └── main.cc
│
├── dsa/                         # New subdirectory for remaining DSA content
│   ├── alg/                     # DSA/alg/ unchanged
│   ├── linked_list/             # DSA/linked_list/ unchanged
│   ├── mix/                     # DSA/mix/ unchanged
│   ├── unit_test/               # DSA/unit_test/ unchanged
│   ├── .clang-format
│   ├── README.md                # DSA's original README
│   └── CMakeLists.txt           # Adjusted for new tree/ path
│
├── docs/
│   ├── tree/README.md           # From DSA docs/tree/
│   ├── alg/
│   │   ├── README.md
│   │   ├── dp.md
│   │   ├── search.md
│   │   ├── sort.md
│   │   └── traversal.md
│   ├── cpp/
│   │   ├── README.md
│   │   └── lib.md
│   └── ... (existing GraphX docs unchanged)
│
└── mkdocs.yml                   # Extended with Tree / Algorithms / C++ nav sections

docs.title: File Decisions
docs.text: DSA file Action tree/ Copy to GraphX/tree/ alg/, linked_list/, mix/, unit_test/ Copy to GraphX/dsa/<dir>/ .clang-format Copy to GraphX/dsa/ CMakeLists.txt Copy to GraphX/dsa/, adjust tree path README.md Copy to GraphX/dsa/README.md docs/tree/, docs/alg/, docs/cpp/ Copy to GraphX/docs/<dir>/ GEMINI.md Skip — GraphX has CLAUDE.md LICENSE Skip — GraphX has its own LICENSE docs/CNAME Skip — GraphX already has one mkdocs.yml Skip — GraphX's mkdocs.yml extended instead

docs.title: CMakeLists.txt Changes
docs.text:
dsa/CMakeLists.txt needs two path adjustments because tree/ moves from dsa/tree/ to ../tree/:

CMake
# Before
include_directories(${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR})
aux_source_directory(${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/tree SRC_TREE)

# After
include_directories(${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR} ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/..)
aux_source_directory(${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/../tree SRC_TREE)

docs.title: mkdocs.yml Changes
docs.text:
Append three new nav sections to GraphX's mkdocs.yml:

YAML
  - Tree:
    - Overview: tree/README.md

  - Algorithms:
    - Overview: alg/README.md
    - Traversal: alg/traversal.md
    - Search: alg/search.md
    - Sort: alg/sort.md
    - Dynamic Programming: alg/dp.md

  - C++:
    - Overview: cpp/README.md
    - Libs: cpp/lib.md

docs.title: Build & Test
docs.text:
After merge, DSA's C++ code is built from GraphX/dsa/:

Bash
cd GraphX/dsa
mkdir build && cd build
cmake ..
make
ctest

docs.title: Tree
docs.text: Source: tree/

docs.title: 二叉树
docs.text:
节点定义（tree/binary_tree.h）：

C++
typedef struct node {
    int data;
    struct node *lchild, *rchild;
} *BTREE;

docs.title: 遍历
docs.text:
方式 顺序 函数 前序遍历 根 → 左 → 右 PreOrderTraverse(BTREE&) 中序遍历 左 → 根 → 右 Inorder(BTREE&) 后序遍历 左 → 右 → 根 Posorder(BTREE&) 层序遍历 逐层从左到右 见 Traversal - BFS

二叉搜索树的中序遍历结果为递增序列。

docs.title: 祖先查询
docs.text:
C++
void Ancestor(BTREE tree, int item);  // 输出节点 item 的所有祖先节点

docs.title: 序列化与反序列化
docs.text: 将二叉树转换为字符串表示，再还原为树结构，常用于持久化或网络传输。

docs.title: LeetCode
docs.text: • leetcode 236: 二叉树两结点的最近公共祖先
